error.network: Can't reach the HikRAD server. Check that it is running and try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.body: Subscriber, profile and live-session screens will appear here.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: The panel hit an unexpected error. Reload the page to continue.

smoke.title: Bidirectional smoke page
smoke.intro: This page proves that Tailwind + Radix with CSS logical properties mirror correctly under RTL.
smoke.startAligned: This box is aligned to the start of the line
smoke.endAligned: This box is aligned to the end of the line
smoke.note: Usernames, IPs and MACs stay left-to-right inside RTL text.
